sections.paragraph:
Original: זרע

Transliteration: zâra‛

Phonetic: zaw-rah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to sow, scatter seed
    1. (Qal)
      1. to sow
      2. producing, yielding seed
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be sown
      2. to become pregnant, be made pregnant
    3. (Pual) to be sown
    4. (Hiphil) to produce seed, yield seed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 582

Part(s) of speech: Verb
